name_cn:
Top quality, complete packaging
New color D-JOY patent leather elegant black in stock!!️
Brand new D-joy medium patent leather, a major hit🔥, bag comes with two shoulder straps, multiple carrying styles🙋🏻‍♀️, looks stylish and fierce, classic quilted design🥅, paired with glossy patent leather, elegant and fashionable🌿
size:26*6*14cm
